title: ficus macrophylla subsp. columnaris
intro: Ficus macrophylla subsp. columnaris, also known as the Moreton Bay fig, is a subspecies of the Moreton Bay fig tree native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ficus macrophylla subsp. columnaris include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
